creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Please contact the FreeBSD Foundation [1] with details if you have specific concerns.

The PR system isn't really intended for general discussion on topics like this; please follow up on the FreeBSD forums [2] or on the FreeBSD-questions mailing list [3].

Links:
[1] https://www.freebsdfoundation.org/about/contact-us/
[2] https://forums.freebsd.org/
[3] https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions
